subject: Multiple large boulders and rock fragments suspended in mid-air against a pale cloudy sky, no figures visible
description: The entire frame is occupied by several large irregular boulders — dark, rough-surfaced — floating or launched in mid-air. Smaller rock fragments accompany them in a scattered salvo pattern. The background is pale gray-white cloudy sky with some warm orange at the edges, suggesting an arid or mountainous environment. There are no humanoid figures visible. The composition reads as a projectile volley caught at peak suspension.
foreground: large dark boulders suspended mid-air with rock debris
background: pale cloudy sky, warm-orange tinge at edges
